name: Berserker's Breastplate
description: Notes This heavy armor can be seen as the polar opposite to the Candy-Coated Armor at the stage of the game it’s obtained in, sacrificing survivability for DPS. While most players likely won’t be comfortable with needing to be below 50% HP to reap the full benefit of the armor, even with just the standard proc of +3 Attack, the armors do give as much ATT as Mercy’s Bane at +7 ATT.
effects: On Shoot: ATT Boost (+3 ATT) for 5 seconds when under 90% HP. ATT Boost (+6 ATT) when under 70% HP. ATT Boost (+9 ATT) when under 50% HP.
